pages.title: Free ATS Resume Checker – Instantly Optimize Your Resume
pages.description: Upload your resume and receive a detailed ATS score in seconds. Free, fast, and privacy‑safe.
tips: Include keywords from the job description

faqs.a: An Applicant Tracking System (ATS) parses resumes to match job criteria.
We keep your resume only for the scoring session; no retention after analysis.

pages.title: Software Engineer Fresher Resume – Sample & Tips
pages.description: Download a free, ATS‑optimized resume template for software engineer freshers. Learn role‑specific bullet points and common mistakes.

faqs.q: How many pages should a fresher resume be?
faqs.a: One page is optimal for freshers to keep it concise and ATS‑friendly.
A 2‑sentence objective aligned with the target role works well.
